title: molluginaceae
intro: The Molluginaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic group that comprises approximately 22 species of annual or perennial plants, often found in dry, sandy, or rocky areas. Members of the Molluginaceae family are typically characterized by their small, white, or pink flowers and narrow, pointed leaves. This family is native to various parts of the world, including Africa, Asia, Australia, and the Americas.
